title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Abbott India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Abbott India
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
